fidup_wiki.description: A free, open-source knowledge base for trainees preparing for the final exam of the German vocational qualification in Data and Process Analysis (Fachinformatiker für Daten- und Prozessanalyse). Covers comprehensive learning material and practice exercises across all relevant exam topics.

packy.description: A browser-based tool that resolves the full dependency tree of any npm package and bundles it, along with all transitive dependencies, into a single, self-contained tarball. No backend required; runs entirely in the browser via WebContainers. Built for deploying packages to air-gapped or network-restricted environments where direct registry access isn't available.

top_graduate.label: Top Graduate Computer Science Expert for Data and Process Analysis 2025 (Berlin)
